code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut tok = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        let parsed = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          v
        when None
          0
        end
        result = list.push(result, parsed)
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(tok)
    let parsed = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    result = list.push(result, parsed)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut filtered: List<Int> = []
for x in nums
  if x > t
    filtered = list.push(filtered, x)
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in filtered
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
